fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 72 should be `len(active) >= limit` instead of `len(active) > limit`. This off-by-one error incorrectly allows a new action when the number of existing actions is exactly at the limit.

constraints.intent: The case where active actions equals the limit is the specific scenario handled incorrectly.
If an action is allowed by falling through, the active count must be strictly less than the limit.
The number of active actions should not be exactly at the limit right before the comparison.
If an action is allowed, there must be at least one remaining slot available.
